song.title: Holy is the Lord
song.author: Chris Tomlin
song.presentation: V1 P1 C V1 P2 C B B P2 C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C2 D Em C2 D . G C2 D 1) We stand and lift up our hands . Em C2 D For the joy of the Lord is our strength . G C2 D We bow down and worship Him now . Em C2 D How great, how awesome is He
[P1] Pre-Chorus . A C And together we sing
[C] Chorus . G C2 D Holy is the Lord God Almighty . Em C2 D The earth is filled with His glory
Holy is the Lord God Almighty
The earth is filled with His glory
The earth is filled with His glory
[P2] Pre-Chorus 2 . A C And together we sing . A C Everyone sing
[B] Bridge . G D It’s rising up all around . F C It’s the anthem of the Lord’s renown
[E] 1) We stand and lift up our hands For the joy of the Lord is our strength We bow down and worship Him now How great, how awesome is He Pre-Chorus And together we sing Chorus Holy is the Lord God Almighty The earth is filled with His glory Holy is the Lord God Almighty The earth is filled with His glory The earth is filled with His glory Pre-Chorus 2 And together we sing Everyone sing Bridge It’s rising up all around It’s the anthem of the Lord’s renown
